title: Tiny Pals
description:
Theres tiny creepers out theres, and they all wanna be your friend.

Tiny Pals is a fun and unique mod that adds a new type of mob to the game – small creepers! These tiny creatures are neutral by default, but you can tame them by throwing TNT around them
body:
Theres tiny creepers out theres, and they all wanna be your friend.


Tiny Pals is a fun and unique mod that adds a new type of mob to the game – small creepers! These tiny creatures are neutral by default, but you can tame them by throwing TNT around them. The creepers will pick up the TNT and become tamed.

Once tamed, these creepers will become your loyal companions and will even carry a backpack where you can store your items. Best part! No need to be carefull – if your tamed creeper dies, it will turn into a talisman that you can use to re-summon it. This allows you to keep your favorite creepers around, even if they fall in battle.

Overall, Tiny Pals is a great mod for players who want to add a little extra cuteness and convenience to their Minecraft experience.


Rain and Fire summon can be obtained by letting an allay be hit by lightning in either rain or clear skies respectively. Plan is to get them to spawn in structures like allays.

Baby ghast are just cute small ghast for now.
